zh.lifeSummary: 當Helena ferch Dafydd of Ashford於從大約1280年到1289年出生在英國肯特阿福德時，她的父親Dafydd Ap Gruffyd51歲，母親Elizabeth de Ferrers49歲。她於1309年與John le Scot I在英國肯特布拉布恩結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1348年在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helena ferch Dafydd of Ashford于从大约1280年到1289年出生在英国肯特阿福德时，她的父亲Dafydd Ap Gruffyd51岁，母亲Elizabeth de Ferrers49岁。她于1309年与John le Scot I在英国肯特布拉布恩结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1348年在英国。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Ashford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Ashford. Those in Devon, Derbyshire, and Shropshire are named from Old English æsc ‘ash’ + ford ‘ford’. One in Middlesex is first recorded in 969 as Ecelesford, and is probably from the personal name Eccel, a diminutive of Ecca ‘edge (of a sword)’ + ford. The one in Kent is from æscet ‘clump of ash trees’ + ford.

nameMeanings.name: Helena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , used also in Germany, the Netherlands, Scandinavia, and Eastern Europe.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Helena ferch Dafydd of Ashford was born from about 1280 to 1289, in Ashford, Kent, England, her father, Dafydd Ap Gruffyd, was 51 and her mother, Elizabeth de Ferrers, was 49. She married John le Scot I in 1309, in Brabourne, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1348, in England.

fr.North Wales: North Wales, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helena ferch Dafydd of Ashford est née du environ 1280 au 1289, à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Dafydd Ap Gruffyd, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Ferrers, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé John le Scot I en 1309, à Brabourne, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1348, à Angleterre.

Sie hat 1309 in Brabourne, Kent, England John le Scot I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1348 in England.

Lei sposato John le Scot I nel 1309, nel Brabourne, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1348, nel England.

ko.lifeSummary: Helena ferch Dafydd of Ashford(이)가 대략 1280년 부터 1289년 까지 영국 켄트 애스h퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dafydd Ap Gruffyd(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Ferrers(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 1309년 영국 켄트 브라보우른에서 John le Scot I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1348년 영국에서 사망했다.
